creator: gjb@FreeBSD.org
text:
The FreeBSD releases for arm/armv6 do not have a "bootonly" image, so producing these files does not make sense.  This has come up in the past, and at present there is no intent to provide them until we switch to pkg(8)-managed binary upgrades (which eliminates the lack of these files entirely).

Additionally, we do not build releases for mips/mips*, so this affects arm/armv6 only.
